content.full_text:
LAW OFFICES

McMURTREY & HARTSOCK
A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION

GENE R. McMURTREY
ROBERT W. HARTSOCK
ERIC BRADSHAW
DAVID C. DUKET

2001 22ND STREET, SUITE 100
BAKERSFIELD, CALIFORNIA 93301

AREA CODE 805
TELEPHONE 322-4417
FAX 322-8123

April 5, 1990




FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
Legal Division
428 "J" Street
Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Attention: Mr. Joe Garcia

                Re: Filing Requirements Regarding Decedent
                    Directors

Dear Mr. Garcia:

     As we have previously discussed via telephone, this
office represents Kern Delta Water District, a California
water district located entirely within the boundaries of Kern
County, California. Hale Costerisan, a director of the
District, has recently become deceased.

     The question which has now arisen is what type of
statements (pertaining to campaign statements and to conflict
of interest statements), if any, must be filed. As we
discussed, there appears to be no mention of this in the
Political Reform Act (Gov. Code, § 81000, et seq.) or in the
regulations pertaining thereto.

     The purpose of this correspondence is to request
written confirmation that the District need not file any
particular form on behalf of the decedent (you indicated
there was no such form) and that the District should merely
put some type of notation in the District's file (the file
relevant to campaign statements and conflict of interest
statements) that the director is deceased. Also, assuming
there are no legislative changes to the Political Reform Act,
would the same procedure (i.e., a notation in the District's
file) be acceptable for Districts other than Kern Delta Water
District in the event of a similar situation?

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
April 5, 1990
Page 2


          Thank you again for your cooperation and assistance
in these matters. A prompt, written confirmation with regard
to this matter, as well as an answer to the immediately
preceding paragraph would also be greatly appreciated.
Please do not hesitate to contact me if you have any
questions, comments or concerns.

                                       Very truly yours,

                                       [signature]
                                       Robert W. Hartsock

RWH:cda
